## TaskQueryOptions.parentTaskId property

Match tasks whose direct parent task has the given primary key. Accepts a single ID or an array (any-of). Used by `querySubtasks`<!-- -->.

**Signature:**

```typescript
parentTaskId?: string | string[] | undefined;
```
